entities.name: V (Vrijen Attawar)
entities.context: Creator and maintainer of N5OS, designing packaging solution for others

entities.name: Nafisa
entities.context: Collaborator who raised usability concerns about onboarding complexity

entities.name: N5OS
entities.context: Sophisticated personal system that V wants to package for adoption by others

entities.name: N5OS Light Version
entities.context: Stripped-down export containing core prompts, personas, architectural rules, knowledge-ingestion and list systems

entities.name: Bootstrap Script
entities.context: Script to unpack, install, and run onboarding flow on clean Zo instance

entities.name: Onboarding Flow
entities.context: Process that asks questions about user context before configuring the system

entities.name: Opinionated Base System
entities.context: Design approach shipping strong defaults but personalizing via targeted questions

entities.name: Master N5OS Repo
entities.context: Primary repository on V's Zo from which exports are generated

entities.name: Zo
entities.context: Platform where N5OS runs and where clean instances receive the bootstrap

relationships.context: V maintains and develops N5OS as his personal system
Pushed on usability concerns for non-technical Zo users
Light version is a periodic export of core N5OS components
Bootstrap script triggers the onboarding flow after unpacking
V and Nafisa converged on this as the solution to packaging complexity
Collaborated with V to define the split between base system and personalization
